name: LiverRaImagingStudyTimeline
title: LiverRa ImagingStudy — Workflow Timeline
description: Serialized JSON timeline of workflow status transitions for an `ImagingStudy` (e.g. ordered→scheduled→in-progress→reported). Each entry carries an ISO-8601 timestamp, the new status, and the actor reference. Stored as a single string so it stays sortable + tamper-evidently hashable from one extension slot.

element.short: JSON array of {at: ISO-8601, status: code, by: Reference} entries
